rows.label: qev090701_MSG0001
rows.name: Um, hello? Yes, could you not...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0002
rows.name:
You there, the one about to take
that mission? I'm speaking to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_JNK0010
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev090701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask the man what he wants.

rows.label: qev090701_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev090701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Take the mission without
paying the man any notice.

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, good. You're a sensible
sort. I promise this will only
take a moment of your time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0004
rows.name:
You know, non-diplomatic people
like you are a real problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0005
rows.name: You're why we still have war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Or maybe you're just hearing-impaired? I
don't know. Whatever. I'm continuing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0007
rows.name:
Now, where was I? Ah, yes. The
mission you were about to take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0008
rows.name:
I analyzed it based on criteria
ranging from Pathfinder experience,
build, intelligence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes, well. In aggregate, the data
clearly indicates that the more
qualified candidate is me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0010
rows.name: Hector Birtwhistle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0011
rows.name:
I invite you to set pride
aside and allow me to handle
this. For humanity's sake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_JNK0030
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev090701_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell H.B. to save his breath.

rows.label: qev090701_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev090701_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask how such a thing could
possibly benefit humanity.

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0012
rows.name:
Stubborn and insulting. No surprise.
Look, just take this mission instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0013
rows.name:
It's quite simple, really—because
I'm more skilled than you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0014
rows.name:
I can offer a total guarantee of
success, whereas you...well...cannot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0015
rows.name:
Here. This other mission should
be right up your alley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0016
rows.name:
I believe that picking two samples
of zesian fleawort should be
well within your abilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Is something amiss? You
seem dissatisfied.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah, how tragic. You now insist
on comparing yourself to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0019
rows.name: The solution is clear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0020
rows.name:
We'll both complete the three
missions I just accepted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0021
rows.name: Only one of us can finish first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0022
rows.name:
This will provide the loser—by
which I mean you— ample chance to
understand the gap separating us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Whenever you eventually complete
those missions, come find me
here. I'll be waiting.[ST:wait ]
